personality: 1 iOS-Native Clean structure with 5 Brutalist precision and 6 Glass/Luxe overlays
personality_one_liner: A calm, premium consumer-finance experience that builds absolute confidence through bright dimensional surfaces, precise typography, and tactile interactions, completely avoiding chaotic crypto cliches.

spacing.rule: Generous, breathable, bento-style layouts for non-critical info. Tight, precise, and visually locked layouts for financial amounts and critical verification steps. Sticky bottom actions.

do's: Use for sticky bottom action bars, floating navigation, bottom-sheet drag handles, and modal scrims.
Pair blur with a translucent tinted base (e.g. 70% of surface) underneath.
dont's: NEVER use glassmorphism on financial information, amounts, warnings, or errors. Financial info MUST be on solid, high-contrast surfaces.

screens.name: Landing/Home
screens.purpose: Hero storytelling introducing Vajra's core promise, with clear CTAs to Create Request or Pay.

states.empty: Clean illustration encouraging the user's first request.

screens.layout: Scroll-linked storytelling elements fading in. Clean bento cards for features. Sticky glass bottom container with primary 'Create Request' button and secondary 'Scan to Pay' icon button.

screens.name: Vajra Touch Setup
screens.purpose: A premium ceremony screen to register the user's passkey or wallet signature.

states.error: Inline error explaining if biometric/passkey registration failed and next steps.

screens.layout: 3D interactive object placeholder at the top (abstract sphere). Large Brutalist typography explaining the security benefit. Sticky bottom primary CTA 'Set up Vajra Touch' that triggers the native passkey sheet.

screens.name: Create Request (Amount -> Terms -> Review)
screens.purpose: 3-step flow to define payment terms and authenticate them.

states.error: Validation errors on solid high-contrast backgrounds.

screens.layout: Step 1: Huge brutalist typography input for amount. Solid high-contrast background. Step 2: Minimalist list to define terms/recipient. Step 3: Summary card on solid surface. 'Lock & Authenticate' sticky CTA at bottom.

screens.name: Share Request
screens.purpose: Display secure link and QR code for the authenticated request.
screens.layout: Large, crisp, high-contrast QR code on a solid white bento card. One-tap copy button below. Haptic feedback on copy.

screens.name: Verify & Pay
screens.purpose: Recipient views the protected details and executes the payment.

states.loading: Simulated loading to check signature validity.
states.error: Expired, Revoked, Wrong-wallet, Wrong-network, or Invalid-signature errors MUST be explicitly explained. Tampered requests break the visual handshake.

screens.layout: Protected details (amount, recipient) inside precise brutalist bordered cards. Each field has a cyan verification mark. Primary bottom CTA 'Verify & Pay'.

screens.name: Transaction Progress
screens.purpose: Truthful tracking of transaction stages on Monad.

states.loading: Active pulsing on the current stage.
states.error: Reverted/Failed stage with clear explanation of whether money moved.

screens.layout: Vertical progressive stepper (Wallet -> Broadcast -> Included -> Final). Minimalist styling.

screens.name: Permanent Receipt
screens.layout: Premium 'seal' graphic at the top. Transaction hash and exact timestamps displayed precisely. Share receipt button.

screens.name: Activity
screens.purpose: List of all past requests and payments.

states.empty: 3D minimal abstract shape illustration. 'No activity yet'.
states.error: Failed to load history, retry button.

screens.layout: Clean list view with precise dividers. Each row shows relative time, amount, and clear status badge.

hero_abstract.alt: A minimal, bright, transparent abstract 3D glass sphere resting on a curved surface.

finality_seal.alt: Abstract 3D render of pastel cubes containing metallic spheres, symbolizing a locked and finalized state.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette: No dark gradients, no generic purple blobs, no glowing crypto coins. Use Monad Purple #6E54FF and soft lavender for brand surfaces, keeping backgrounds bright and dimensional (#FCFBFF).
Financial data, amounts, and critical verification info MUST sit on solid, high-contrast surfaces (e.g., surface or surfaceInverse). NEVER use translucent glass for critical financial information.
Use glassmorphism selectively: ONLY for floating navigation, bottom-sheet drag handles, sticky CTAs, and modal scrims.
Errors must be explicit and truthful. Never expose raw RPC errors. Translate them into user-friendly explanations (e.g., 'Wrong network', 'Already paid'). Never show a fake payment success.
Implement brutalist precision for input fields and layout borders (borderStrong: #0E091C).
Use Space Grotesk for display typography to give a premium, slightly technical feel, and Plus Jakarta Sans for highly readable body text.
Include verification marks (cyan checks) next to protected fields in the 'Verify & Pay' screen.
Wire haptics to all primary tactile actions: copy to clipboard, passkey setup success, payment swipe/button.
